name: acid_12_compound_repair_with_query
utterances: Iris is a parent of Jace, Jace is a parent of Kira, and Kira is a parent of Lio.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y, and if X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Actually retract these: parent(jace, kira) and parent(kira, lio).
Jace is a parent of Mira, and Mira is a parent of Lio.
Is Iris an ancestor of Lio?
